card.title: mazer: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
card.summary: Repair the shared viewport authority and prove deterministic menu, Options, play, and Pause geometry across compact, wide, restored, and tall-phone surfaces without per-screen offsets.
card.objective: Keep browser-owned layout dimensions and environment-owned safe-area insets live across resize, maximize/restore, and mobile browser-chrome changes, then preserve physical-device proof as the final terminal boundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Every primary Mazer surface has an owner, supported viewport category, and no-overlap contract.
Physical iPhone safe areas and installed-PWA shell bands do not obstruct HUD, Pause, maze, controls, overlays, or scroll content.
Native browser resize, maximize, and restore preserve deterministic geometry and current route/overlay state.
Route-aware evidence records viewport, safe-area, mode, overlay, scroll, and layout diagnostics with no actionable console or page errors.
discoveries: The viewport resolver preferred document dimensions that were themselves sized from its previously published content rectangle, creating a stale maximize/restore feedback loop.
The public safe-area CSS variables overwrote their own env(safe-area-inset-*) source after boot, preventing later environment inset changes from being observed.

The maintained transition runner treated intentionally skipped bottom captures and unrelated random topology as layout failures; transition mode now measures only its captured layout surfaces while dedicated topology gates remain authoritative.
nextActions: Run PR #72 preview on a physical iPhone Safari session with browser chrome expanded and collapsed.
Install the same preview as a PWA and capture menu, active play, and Pause against Dynamic Island and home-indicator safe areas.
Move to Review only if the physical-device evidence preserves the shared content rectangle; otherwise reopen only the shared viewport owner.
blockers: Post-fix physical iPhone Safari and installed-PWA safe-area/browser-chrome proof is not yet available; deterministic emulation and desktop resize proof do not replace it.
evidence: Full Mazer verification: 48 files / 360 tests and production bundle passed
Vercel preview deployment dpl_5h1c8EkYAHuqUZ8Kx1aAgccoFjpo READY at https://fawxzzy-mazer-qonuksqh7-fawxzzy.vercel.app
Deployed preview restored 390x844 board/HUD/controller geometry exactly after 1440x900 with no console warnings/errors

entry.headline: Shared viewport authority repaired and preview-proven
completed: Separated environment-owned safe-area inputs from published Mazer CSS values.
Removed the document-size feedback loop and proved exact maximize/restore geometry.
Passed full source verification, maintained four-surface transition capture, and deployed preview browser readback.
discovered: Only physical iPhone Safari and installed-PWA browser-chrome/safe-area evidence remains before terminal review.
next: Use the PR #72 preview for physical iPhone Safari and installed-PWA proof; do not substitute another emulated matrix.
blockers: A physical iPhone installed-PWA/browser-chrome proof session is still required.
